title: Peeling Fruit | #shorts
full_text: Mom, what? I'm completely shooken. Are you opening those lies for dad? Don't be so shooken. I overheard him talking to his mom and he's like, "Mom, liuches are in season and nobody's here to open them for me. Why don't you come for the month of June and July and stay here and open lies?" And I was like, "Oh my god, let's get every last one. I'm going to open them right now." You can just admit you care about him. That's right, Br. That's right. You know what I'm going to do next? I'm going to go inside and make out with All right. All right. Thank you. No. Come. Come. Wait. No. Film it. Come. Goodbye. You want to see the love?
